text: What changes happen to my body during puberty?
Ni ibihe bintu bihinduka mu mubiri wanjye mu gihe cy'amabyiruka?
What are my sexual and reproductive rights?
Ni izihe burenganzira mfite ku birebana n'imibonano mpuzabitsina no kubyara?
Ni ubuhe buryo bushobora kurinda umuntu gutwita?
How can I protect myself from sexually transmitted infections?
Nakwirinda nte kwandura indwara zandurira mu mibonano mpuzabitsina?
What does consent mean in a sexual relationship?
Kwemera gukora imibonano mpuzabitsina bisobanura iki?
What should I do if I or someone I know has been sexually assaulted?
Nakora iki niba jyewe cyangwa undi muntu nzi yarakorewe ihohoterwa rishingiye ku gitsina?
Do persons with disabilities have the same SRH rights?
Ese abafite ubumuga bafite uburenganzira bumwe mu bijyanye n'ubuzima bw'ikiremwamuntu?
